description: Speakers interleave discussion of two separate events simultaneously before resolving both with different attendee sets.

events.title: Product Roadmap Session
events.reasoning: Bob proposes Monday at 10 AM for the product roadmap session and Alice confirms. Duration is 10 to noon (2 hours). Alice confirms this is just her and Bob.

events.title: Hiring Committee Review
events.reasoning: Carol proposes Thursday at 2 PM for the hiring committee review. Dave confirms. Alice and Bob are explicitly excluded. An HR rep is mentioned but not named.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 2 events discussed simultaneously: roadmap session on Monday and hiring review on Thursday with different attendees.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Monday=Feb 23, Thursday=Feb 26. Discussion interleaves both events before resolving each separately.
